gate_type: final validation + source commit (dev) + push to origin/dev + gpt-handoff report
ready_for_slava_manual_retest_reason: infra/docs/workflow committed locally only; push rejected by GitHub (PAT lacks workflow scope); nothing deployed; no product/runtime change
scope_summary: Validate offline, safety-scan, QA-inspect, then commit the accepted Azure IaC skeleton + 8 Azure docs + 1 disabled workflow to dev and push to origin/dev. Commit succeeded (a70071d); push REJECTED because the PAT lacks the `workflow` scope and the commit adds a GitHub Actions workflow file. Atomic rejection — origin unchanged.

commit.message: chore: add Azure IaC skeleton and deployment plan
commit.hook_result: PASS — genuine QA-CLEARED via independent Opus /qa-inspector (no [qa-bypass] on source commit)

push.remote_message: refusing to allow a Personal Access Token to create or update workflow .github/workflows/azure-deploy-demo.yml without workflow scope

validation.result: EXIT 0, 0 errors, 0 warnings, ARM template 1291 lines
validation.limitations: offline only — no az login / no what-if / no deployment

safety.secrets_scan_staged: PASS — no secret values; only all-zeros placeholder + 3 public Azure built-in role IDs; DEEPSEEK_API_KEY name-only in security notes

blocker.detail: The PAT used by git lacks the `workflow` OAuth scope. The commit contains .github/workflows/azure-deploy-demo.yml, so GitHub rejects the entire push. Not a content/secret problem.

remediation_options.A_recommended: Slava grants the PAT `workflow` scope (GitHub > Developer settings > PAT > enable workflow; or `gh auth refresh -s workflow -h github.com`), then a PUSH-ONLY retry of the same commit a70071d -> PUSHED. No re-commit.
remediation_options.B_alternative: GPT authorizes deferring the workflow file: re-commit infra/ + 8 docs only (drop .github/workflows), push now, add the workflow in AZURE_MINIMAL_DEPLOY_V0.1.

next_safe_step.name: AZURE_IAC_SKELETON_PUSH_RETRY_V0.1
next_safe_step.action: after path A: pre-push checks + git push origin dev of a70071d; verify origin/dev==a70071d and origin/main unchanged
next_safe_step.alt: if path B: re-scoped commit gate dropping the workflow file
